'''âr-v-y''' ('''ravaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zincize|zincize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zincize|zincize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-v-y
|-
! Lemma
| ravaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravayithi|ravayithi]] || [[word:ravayiji|ravayiji]] || [[word:ravayishi|ravayishi]] || [[word:ravayi|ravayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravayuthuth|ravayuthuth]] || [[word:ravayujuj|ravayujuj]] || [[word:ravayushush|ravayushush]] || [[word:ravay|ravay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravayuthu|ravayuthu]] || [[word:ravayuju|ravayuju]] || [[word:ravayushu|ravayushu]] || [[word:ravayu|ravayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravayufuth|ravayufuth]] || [[word:ravayufuj|ravayufuj]] || [[word:ravayufush|ravayufush]] || [[word:ravayuf|ravayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravayethe|ravayethe]] || [[word:ravayeje|ravayeje]] || [[word:ravayeshe|ravayeshe]] || [[word:ravaye|ravaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravayothoth|ravayothoth]] || [[word:ravayojoj|ravayojoj]] || [[word:ravayoshosh|ravayoshosh]] || [[word:ravay|ravay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravayotho|ravayotho]] || [[word:ravayojo|ravayojo]] || [[word:ravayosho|ravayosho]] || [[word:ravayo|ravayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravayofoth|ravayofoth]] || [[word:ravayofoj|ravayofoj]] || [[word:ravayofosh|ravayofosh]] || [[word:ravayof|ravayof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravayĂŻfĂŻf|ravayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻfĂŻf|ravayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻfĂŻf|ravayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻfĂŻf|ravayĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]] || [[word:ravayĂŻf|ravayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravayĂŠthĂŠ|ravayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ravayĂŠjĂŠ|ravayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ravayĂŠshĂŠ|ravayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ravayĂŠ|ravayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravayathath|ravayathath]] || [[word:ravayajaj|ravayajaj]] || [[word:ravayashash|ravayashash]] || [[word:ravay|ravay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravayatha|ravayatha]] || [[word:ravayaja|ravayaja]] || [[word:ravayasha|ravayasha]] || [[word:ravaya|ravaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravayafath|ravayafath]] || [[word:ravayafaj|ravayafaj]] || [[word:ravayafash|ravayafash]] || [[word:ravayaf|ravayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ravayasha|ravayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goravayasha|goravayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiravayasha|gokiravayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ravaynĂŒsha|ravaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goravaynknĂŒsha|goravaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiravaynĂŒsha|gokiravaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ravayshĂ«sha|ravayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goravaynkshĂ«sha|goravaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiravayshĂ«sha|gokiravayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravayrosha|ravayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravaynkrosha|goravaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravayrosha|gokiravayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ravaymusha|ravaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goravaynkmusha|goravaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravaymusha|gokiravaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ravaysherasha|ravaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goravaynksherasha|goravaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiravaysherasha|gokiravaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ravayngasha|ravayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goravaynkngasha|goravaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiravayngasha|gokiravayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ravayyasha|ravayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goravaynkyasha|goravaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiravayyasha|gokiravayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ravayyamasha|ravayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goravaynkyamasha|goravaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiravayyamasha|gokiravayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravaynĂŒshĂ«sha|ravaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|goravaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiravaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravaynĂŒrosha|ravaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravaynknĂŒrosha|goravaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravaynĂŒrosha|gokiravaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravaynĂŒmusha|ravaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravaynknĂŒmusha|goravaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravaynĂŒmusha|gokiravaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravayshĂ«nĂŒsha|ravayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goravaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiravayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravayshĂ«rosha|ravayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravaynkshĂ«rosha|goravaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravayshĂ«rosha|gokiravayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravayshĂ«musha|ravayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravaynkshĂ«musha|goravaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravayshĂ«musha|gokiravayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravayronĂŒsha|ravayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravaynkronĂŒsha|goravaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravayronĂŒsha|gokiravayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravayroshĂ«sha|ravayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravaynkroshĂ«sha|goravaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravayroshĂ«sha|gokiravayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravayromusha|ravayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravaynkromusha|goravaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravayromusha|gokiravayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravaymunĂŒsha|ravaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravaynkmunĂŒsha|goravaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravaymunĂŒsha|gokiravaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravaymushĂ«sha|ravaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravaynkmushĂ«sha|goravaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravaymushĂ«sha|gokiravaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravaymurosha|ravaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravaynkmurosha|goravaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravaymurosha|gokiravaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ravay|ravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠy|rĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horavay|horavay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠvĂŠy|horĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoravay|hohoravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠvĂŠy|hohorĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒravay|nĂŒravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠvĂŠy|nĂŒrĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒravay|nĂŒnĂŒravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠvĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻravay|nĂŻravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠvĂŠy|nĂŻrĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻravay|nĂŻnĂŻravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠvĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luravay|luravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠvĂŠy|lurĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluravay|luluravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠvĂŠy|lulurĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liravay|liravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠvĂŠy|lirĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliravay|liliravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠvĂŠy|lilirĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koravay|koravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠvĂŠy|korĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoravay|kokoravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠvĂŠy|kokorĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keravay|keravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠvĂŠy|kerĂŠvĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeravay|kekeravay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠvĂŠy|kekerĂŠvĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
